subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-07 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: Our hope is that the East and the West shall embrace one another, and that the various people and nations of the world
subcodes.first_line_orig: امید ما اینست که شرق و غرب دست در آغوش شود و ملل و امم مختلفه حکم یک ملت
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @unity in diversity, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action
